description_long: This is a necklace presented in a sleek, matte black jewelry box with a hinged lid. The necklace features alternating red and white links, forming a visually striking chain with a metallic clasp at the top center. The clasp appears to be a decorative metallic element, possibly silver or stainless steel, with a textured or engraved finish. The interior of the box is lined with a light gray or white cushioned material, providing a soft contrast to the vivid colors of the necklace. The box is sturdy and angular, designed to protect and showcase the jewelry. The overall presentation is elegant and modern, suitable for gifting or display in a retail setting.
description: A red and white chain necklace with a metallic clasp, elegantly displayed in a matte black jewelry box with a soft, light interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace laid out in a circular arrangement inside the open jewelry box.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the box and the necklace's clasp positioned near the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back of the closed jewelry box, with no necklace visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the necklace's circular form and the open lid of the box.
